macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Major Indexes Suffer Fourth Straight Weekly Decline Amid Geopolitical Tensions
items.summary: The S&P 500 fell 1.9% last week, breaching its 200-day moving average for the first time since May 2025, while Nasdaq 100 and Dow Jones dropped 2.0% and 2.1% respectively, driven by Iran war concerns, rising oil prices, and persistent inflation. Indexes are nearing correction territory with Nasdaq and Dow down 9.6% and 9.2% from peaks.

items.title: Escalating Iran Conflict Pushes Stocks Toward Correction; Energy Sector Outperforms
items.summary: Stocks teeter on correction edge as S&P 500 is down 6.8% from January peak amid Iran war disrupting scarce materials supply for tech giants like Apple and Nvidia, surging oil prices, and inflation fears. Energy sector gained 3% with strong performances from SolarEdge and Venture Global.

items.title: Stock Futures Slide on Heightened Iran Tensions and Key Data Ahead
items.summary: U.S. stock futures ticked lower on March 23 as rising Iran tensions kept investors cautious, following another weekly loss for major indexes under pressure. Upcoming UK PMI data adds to market watchlist.

items.title: Market Enters Risk-Off Mode with Distribution Pressure and Weakening Breadth
items.summary: Major US indexes show Stage 4 breakdown attempts and lost structural integrity under resistance, with only 31-37% of stocks above key moving averages, down sharply this week. Energy sector remains the sole bright spot amid broad deterioration.

items.title: Hang Seng Index Down 0.7% with Sharp Sector Divergence
items.summary: Hong Kong's Hang Seng fell 0.7% last week, outperforming Western peers, but materials sector plunged on metal prices while industrials led by clean energy gained. Index tests 25,000 support amid bearish momentum.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Trades Below $69,000 Amid Market Fear
items.summary: Bitcoin is trading around $68,689, below $69,000, with the Fear & Greed Index at 27 indicating high fear in the market. Most major cryptocurrencies are experiencing downward pressure.

items.title: Binance Reports BTC Down 0.59% at $68,247
items.summary: As of 09:30 AM UTC on March 23, 2026, Bitcoin is at $68,247, down 0.59%, with most top cryptocurrencies by market cap also trading lower. Some altcoins are outperforming amid the broader decline.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: IIT Kanpur Launches Intensive AI and Machine Learning Certification Program
items.summary: IIT Kanpur announced a four-week certificate program in AI, ML, Neural Networks, and Deep Learning starting June 15, 2026, targeting students, professionals, and researchers with Python training and hands-on projects.

items.title: Rise of Intelligent Inspection and Predictive Metrology with AI
items.summary: Kitov AI is advancing industrial quality control using AI to analyze CAD models, propose inspection strategies, enable real-time 3D inspections, and predict defects from sensor data in manufacturing.

items.title: Autonomous Surveillance Towers Launched with Edge AI and Machine Learning
items.summary: New autonomous surveillance systems utilize edge AI, machine learning, and video analytics to identify and track items across remote areas for defense applications.

items.title: Digital Assistant Market Projected to Reach $15.89 Billion in 2026
items.summary: The digital assistant market is expected to grow from $13.22 billion in 2025 to $15.89 billion in 2026 at a 20.1% CAGR, driven by AI, NLP advancements, and integration into smart devices and enterprises.

items.title: NVIDIA GTC 2026 Highlights AI Shift to Operations and AI Factories
items.summary: NVIDIA GTC 2026 emphasizes that AI has evolved from building to operating, with 'AI Factory' concepts and token economics turning AI into business reality.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Pearl Abyss Apologizes for Undisclosed Generative AI Use in Crimson Desert
items.summary: Crimson Desert developer Pearl Abyss has apologized for failing to disclose the use of generative AI tools to create 2D visual props during production. The studio has pledged to conduct a comprehensive audit to identify and remove all generative AI assets from the game.

items.title: Climber Animals: Together Surpasses 2 Million Sales Following China Market Expansion
items.summary: Devotion Interactive's Climber Animals: Together has achieved 2 million copies sold within 30 days by establishing proprietary publishing infrastructure in China. The game reached a 40,000-player peak on Steam and secured a Top 20 position on the Global Top Sellers chart.

items.title: Digimon Story: Time Stranger 2027 DLC Announced at Digimon Con 2026
items.summary: Bandai Namco announced new DLC for Digimon Story: Time Stranger coming in 2027 during Digimon Con 2026 on March 21. The development team will partially reflect results from the 139th Digimon Referendum fan poll in the expansion.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Faraday Future Announces SEC Investigation Closure
items.summary: Faraday Future announced that the SEC has ended its years-long investigation with no enforcement action against the company or related persons. The company plans to focus resources on strategy execution, including deliveries of its FX Super One EAI-MPV beginning in 2026 and expansion into Embodied AI Robotics.

items.title: Amazon March 2026 Tech Deals on Gaming PCs and Monitors
items.summary: Amazon is offering deep discounts on high-end gaming PCs and monitors as part of its March 2026 tech deals promotion.

items.title: Boyaa Interactive Seeks $70M Crypto Treasury Expansion
items.summary: Hong Kong-based Web3 gaming firm Boyaa Interactive International is seeking shareholder approval to expand its cryptocurrency treasury by up to $70 million.
